name: Al Griffin Mrmorial Park
description: Al Griffin Mrmorial Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Bay City, OR. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. The courts are free. The courts cannot be reserved.

name: Manzanita City Park
description: Manzanita City Park is a place to play pickleball in Manzanita, OR. There is 1 outdoor concrete court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. The court is free. Amenities include restrooms and water.

name: Nehalem Elementary School
description: Come play pickleball at Nehalem Elementary School in Nehalem, OR! There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms and water.

name: North County Recreation District
description: Come play pickleball at North County Recreation District in Nehalem, OR! There are 4 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Tillamook County Family YMCA
description: Come play pickleball at Tillamook County Family YMCA in Tillamook, OR! There are 4 courts. 2 are indoors and 2 are outdoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms. A membership is required to play.

name: Tillamook Fairgrounds
description: Come play pickleball at Tillamook Fairgrounds in Tillamook, OR! There are 4 indoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like lights.
